## Summary

<!-- Short description of what changed and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the new behavior.
- [ ] `pnpm exec turbo run type-check` passes for affected packages.
- [ ] `pnpm exec turbo run test` passes for affected packages.
- [ ] Changeset added if this changes a published package's user-visible behavior.
- [ ] Docs, public registry, and examples updated when a public API changed.
- [ ] No unrelated edits, commented-out code, or dead files.
